explanations.1: This HTML comment tells a documentation tool (like Docusaurus) to highlight the very next line visually, so readers' eyes are drawn to it.
explanations.2: The curly braces with a hash symbol at the end create a custom URL anchor, so people can link directly to this section using #intro in the URL.
explanations.6: Like line 1, this tells the documentation tool to highlight the next line for emphasis.
explanations.7: This creates another custom URL anchor for this section, allowing direct links via #chapter1.
